subcodes.first_line: This is a Book sent down by the All-Merciful unto him who hath turned unto Him, hearkened, and proclaimed: "Yea, O Thou Who art the Desire of all in the heavens and on earth!" [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله الرحمن لمن اقبل و سمع و قال بلی یا مقصود من فی السموات و الارضین
subcodes.subjects: @prayers (general or uncategorized), @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @proclamation to the people of the world, @Manifestation of God as tree of life; sadratu'l-muntaha
